<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Signature Cafe — An Experience | Madhapur, Hyderabad</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;0,900;1,400;1,700&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Dancing+Script:wght@400;600;700&family=Cinzel:wght@400;600;700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
:root{
--gold-light:#f5d080;--gold-mid:#c8841a;--gold-dark:#8b5a08;--copper:#d4920a;
--brown:#3a2a0a;--brown-light:#5a3e1b;
--bg-primary:#ffffff;--bg-secondary:#faf8f4;
--text-primary:#3a2a0a;--text-secondary:#5a3e1b;
--nav-bg:rgba(255,255,255,0.97);--mobile-menu-bg:rgba(255,255,255,0.98);
--card-bg:#faf8f4;--card-bg2:#ffffff;--loader-bg:#ffffff;
--border-color:rgba(200,148,26,0.15);--shadow-color:rgba(200,132,26,0.1);
--footer-bg:#0a0600;--stat-box-bg:#ffffff;--about-visual-bg:#ffffff;
--map-badge-bg:rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
--cta-bg:linear-gradient(135deg,#fdf9f0 0%,#faf5e8 50%,#fdf9f0 100%);
--scroll-text-color:rgba(220,180,80,0.5);--footer-text:rgba(220,185,100,0.65);
--footer-bottom-text:rgba(200,160,80,0.4);--loc-icon-bg:#ffffff;
--testi-card-bg:#faf8f4;--menu-toggle-bg:rgba(200,148,26,0.08);
--overlay-bg:rgba(0,0,0,0.85);
}
[data-theme="dark"]{
--bg-primary:#0f0a04;--bg-secondary:#1a1108;
--text-primary:#f0d090;--text-secondary:#c8a060;
--brown:#f0d090;--brown-light:#c8a060;
--nav-bg:rgba(15,10,4,0.97);--mobile-menu-bg:rgba(15,10,4,0.98);
--card-bg:#1a1108;--card-bg2:#0f0a04;--loader-bg:#0f0a04;
--border-color:rgba(200,148,26,0.25);--shadow-color:rgba(200,132,26,0.15);
--footer-bg:#0f0a04;--stat-box-bg:#0f0a04;--about-visual-bg:#0f0a04;
--map-badge-bg:rgba(15,10,4,0.95);
--cta-bg:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1108 0%,#0f0a04 50%,#1a1108 100%);
--scroll-text-color:rgba(240,208,144,0.35);--footer-text:rgba(200,160,96,0.7);
--footer-bottom-text:rgba(200,160,96,0.42);--loc-icon-bg:#0f0a04;
--testi-card-bg:#1a1108;--menu-toggle-bg:rgba(200,148,26,0.15);
--overlay-bg:rgba(0,0,0,0.92);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background-color:var(--bg-primary);font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;overflow-x:hidden;transition:background-color 0.4s ease,color 0.4s ease;color:var(--text-primary);}
/* ===== PARTICLE CANVAS ===== */
#particleCanvas{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;opacity:0.45;}
/* ===== LOGO COMPONENTS ===== */
.sig-cafe-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-weight:900;line-height:1;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f5d080 0%,#c8841a 15%,#8b5a04 30%,#d4920a 45%,#8b5a08 60%,#c8841a 75%,#f0c060 90%,#d4a020 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;filter:drop-shadow(2px 4px 6px rgba(100,60,0,0.35)) drop-shadow(-1px -1px 2px rgba(255,220,100,0.4));letter-spacing:0.02em;}
.orn-divider{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;margin:5px auto 8px;}
.orn-line-l{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#8b6010 50%,#c8941a 100%);}
.orn-line-r{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(270deg,transparent,#8b6010 50%,#c8941a 100%);}
.orn-diamond{width:5px;height:5px;background:#c8941a;transform:rotate(45deg);margin:0 4px;}
.orn-dot{width:3px;height:3px;background:#c8941a;border-radius:50%;margin:0 2px;}
.sig-tagline{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:rgba(240,200,120,0.75);text-transform:uppercase;}
.by-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;}
.by-line-l{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#8b6010 60%,#c8941a 100%);}
.by-line-r{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(270deg,transparent,#8b6010 60%,#c8941a 100%);}
.by-arr-l{width:7px;height:7px;border-top:1px solid #c8941a;border-right:1px solid #c8941a;transform:rotate(-135deg);margin:0 2px;}
.by-arr-r{width:7px;height:7px;border-top:1px solid #c8941a;border-right:1px solid #c8941a;transform:rotate(45deg);margin:0 2px;}
.by-badge{position:relative;border:1.5px solid #c8941a;padding:7px 24px;margin:0 10px;background:var(--bg-primary);border-radius:3px;}
.by-badge::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:3px;border:0.5px solid rgba(200,148,26,0.35);border-radius:2px;pointer-events:none;}
.by-word{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-weight:400;font-style:italic;color:var(--text-primary);letter-spacing:0.05em;line-height:1;}
.huqqa-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:1px;}
.hqa-letter{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-weight:900;line-height:1;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f5d080 0%,#d4920a 10%,#8b5a04 25%,#c8841a 40%,#7a4e03 55%,#b87818 70%,#f0c060 85%,#c8841a 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;filter:drop-shadow(3px 5px 8px rgba(80,40,0,0.5)) drop-shadow(-1px -1px 3px rgba(255,220,80,0.3));display:inline-block;}
.q-wrap{position:relative;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.q-base{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-weight:900;line-height:1;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f5d080 0%,#d4920a 10%,#8b5a04 25%,#c8841a 40%,#7a4e03 55%,#b87818 70%,#f0c060 85%,#c8841a 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;filter:drop-shadow(3px 5px 8px rgba(80,40,0,0.5));position:relative;z-index:2;}
.q-ring{position:absolute;width:76%;height:76%;border-radius:50%;border:3px solid #d4920a;z-index:3;box-shadow:0 0 6px 1px rgba(212,146,10,0.5),0 0 12px 3px rgba(212,146,10,0.25),inset 0 0 6px 1px rgba(212,146,10,0.2);animation:qGlow 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes qGlow{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 6px 1px rgba(212,146,10,0.5),0 0 12px 3px rgba(212,146,10,0.25),inset 0 0 6px 1px rgba(212,146,10,0.2);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 10px 2px rgba(212,146,10,0.65),0 0 20px 5px rgba(212,146,10,0.35),inset 0 0 10px 2px rgba(212,146,10,0.3);}}
.q-star{position:absolute;z-index:5;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-58%);}
.cartel-text{font-family:'Dancing Script',cursive;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f0c060 0%,#c8841a 20%,#8b5a08 45%,#c8841a 70%,#f0c060 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;filter:drop-shadow(1px 3px 4px rgba(100,60,0,0.4));}
.bot-orn{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;margin:5px auto 8px;}
.bot-line-l{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#8b6010 70%,#c8941a 100%);}
.bot-line-r{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(270deg,transparent,#8b6010 70%,#c8941a 100%);}
.bot-center{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:0 8px;}
.bot-dia{width:5px;height:5px;background:#c8941a;transform:rotate(45deg);}
.bot-sm-dot{width:3px;height:3px;background:#c8941a;border-radius:50%;}
.exp-text{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-weight:400;color:var(--text-primary);letter-spacing:0.1em;}
.star-svg{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 2px rgba(200,132,26,0.8));}
/* ===== NAVBAR ===== */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:1000;padding:15px 50px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:var(--nav-bg);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);transition:all 0.3s ease;}
nav.scrolled{padding:10px 50px;box-shadow:0 2px 30px var(--shadow-color);}
.nav-logo{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;text-decoration:none;gap:0;}
.nav-logo-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08,#c8841a);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;letter-spacing:0.08em;line-height:1;}
.nav-logo-sub{font-family:'Dancing Script',cursive;font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--gold-mid);line-height:1;margin-top:1px;}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:28px;list-style:none;align-items:center;}
.nav-links a{color:var(--text-primary);text-decoration:none;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.67rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color 0.3s ease;position:relative;padding-bottom:3px;}
.nav-links a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#c8841a,#f0c060);transition:width 0.3s ease;}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold-mid);}
.nav-links a:hover::after{width:100%;}
.nav-reserve{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08)!important;color:white!important;padding:10px 22px!important;border-radius:2px;}
.nav-reserve:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0c060,#c8841a)!important;color:var(--brown)!important;}
.nav-reserve::after{display:none!important;}
/* Nav right controls */
.nav-right-controls{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.theme-toggle-nav{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid var(--gold-mid);background:var(--nav-bg);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1rem;transition:all 0.3s ease;box-shadow:0 2px 8px var(--shadow-color);flex-shrink:0;}
.theme-toggle-nav:hover{transform:scale(1.1);background:rgba(200,132,26,0.1);}
.hamburger{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;padding:5px;}
.hamburger span{width:24px;height:1.5px;background:var(--gold-mid);display:block;transition:all 0.3s ease;}
/* Mobile menu */
.mobile-menu{display:none;position:fixed;top:70px;left:0;right:0;background:var(--mobile-menu-bg);padding:28px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);z-index:999;flex-direction:column;gap:18px;align-items:center;}
.mobile-menu.open{display:flex;}
.mobile-menu a{color:var(--text-primary);text-decoration:none;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.82rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;}
/* ===== HERO ===== */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:110px 40px 80px;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0d0800 0%,#1a0f02 35%,#0f0a03 65%,#000000 100%);position:relative;overflow:hidden;z-index:1;}
.hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 38%,rgba(200,140,20,0.13) 0%,rgba(140,90,8,0.06) 40%,transparent 70%);pointer-events:none;}
.hero-logo{max-width:800px;width:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}
.hero .sig-cafe-title{font-size:clamp(3.5rem,9vw,8rem);margin-bottom:6px;}
.hero .orn-divider{max-width:560px;}
.hero .sig-tagline{font-size:clamp(0.7rem,1.8vw,1rem);margin-bottom:25px;margin-top:4px;}
.hero .by-row{max-width:500px;margin:0 auto 28px;}
.hero .by-word{font-size:1.3rem;}
.hero .huqqa-row{gap:2px;margin-bottom:5px;}
.hero .hqa-letter{font-size:clamp(4rem,12vw,9.5rem);}
.hero .q-wrap{width:clamp(4rem,12vw,9.5rem);height:clamp(4rem,12vw,9.5rem);}
.hero .q-base{font-size:clamp(4rem,12vw,9.5rem);}
.hero .q-star{width:clamp(1rem,3vw,2.8rem);height:clamp(1rem,3vw,2.8rem);}
.hero .cartel-text{font-size:clamp(2.2rem,6vw,5rem);margin-top:-5px;}
.hero .bot-orn{max-width:380px;}
.hero .exp-text{font-size:clamp(1rem,2.5vw,1.5rem);}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:18px;margin-top:45px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;}
.btn-gold{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08);color:white;padding:16px 40px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;position:relative;overflow:hidden;display:inline-block;}
.btn-gold::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:100%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0c060,#c8841a);transition:left 0.35s ease;z-index:0;}
.btn-gold:hover::before{left:0;}
.btn-gold:hover{color:var(--brown);}
.btn-gold span{position:relative;z-index:1;}
.btn-outline{background:transparent;color:var(--gold-mid);padding:15px 40px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;border:1.5px solid var(--gold-mid);cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;display:inline-block;}
.btn-outline:hover{background:rgba(200,132,26,0.07);border-color:var(--gold-dark);color:var(--gold-dark);}
.scroll-down{position:absolute;bottom:30px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;text-decoration:none;}
.scroll-down span{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.58rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;color:var(--scroll-text-color);text-transform:uppercase;}
.scroll-line{width:1px;height:40px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#c8841a,transparent);animation:scrollAnim 2s ease infinite;}
@keyframes scrollAnim{0%,100%{opacity:0.3;}50%{opacity:1;}}
/* ===== ANIMATIONS ===== */
.fade-up{opacity:0;transform:translateY(35px);transition:opacity 0.8s ease,transform 0.8s ease;}
.fade-up.show{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
/* ===== SECTION COMMONS ===== */
.section-pad{padding:95px 40px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.sec-label{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.63rem;letter-spacing:0.35em;color:var(--gold-mid);text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:12px;}
.sec-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,3rem);font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#8b5a08,#c8841a,#8b5a08);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;margin-bottom:18px;}
.sec-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:60px;}
.sec-sub{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.12rem;color:var(--text-secondary);max-width:550px;margin:0 auto;line-height:1.9;font-style:italic;}
.divider-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;margin:14px auto 18px;max-width:280px;}
.div-line{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8841a);}
.div-line.r{background:linear-gradient(270deg,transparent,#c8841a);}
.div-dia{width:5px;height:5px;background:#c8941a;transform:rotate(45deg);}
/* ===== ABOUT ===== */
.about{background:var(--bg-secondary);border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:75px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;align-items:center;}
.about-content h2{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,2.8rem);font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#8b5a08,#c8841a,#8b5a08);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;margin-bottom:22px;line-height:1.35;}
.about-content p{color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:1.08rem;line-height:2;margin-bottom:18px;font-style:italic;}
.about-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:18px;margin-top:38px;}
.stat-box{text-align:center;padding:20px 10px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);background:var(--stat-box-bg);position:relative;transition:transform 0.3s ease,box-shadow 0.3s ease;}
.stat-box:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 8px 25px var(--shadow-color);}
.stat-box::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:10%;right:10%;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8841a,transparent);}
.stat-num{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;display:block;}
.stat-lbl{font-size:0.68rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:4px;display:block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;opacity:0.7;}
.about-visual{position:relative;height:460px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);background:var(--about-visual-bg);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;padding:20px;}
.about-visual::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,rgba(200,132,26,0.04) 0%,transparent 70%);}
/* ===== EXPERIENCE ===== */
.experience{background:var(--bg-primary);}
.exp-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.exp-card{padding:36px 26px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);background:var(--card-bg);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:all 0.4s ease;}
.exp-card::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8841a,transparent);transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform 0.4s ease;}
.exp-card:hover{border-color:rgba(200,148,26,0.38);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 12px 38px var(--shadow-color);}
.exp-card:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1);}
.card-icon{font-size:2.2rem;margin-bottom:16px;display:block;}
.card-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.82rem;letter-spacing:0.12em;color:var(--gold-mid);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;}
.card-desc{color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:1rem;line-height:1.85;font-style:italic;}
/* ===== MENU SYSTEM ===== */
.menu-sec{background:var(--bg-secondary);border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);}
.menu-sections-wrapper{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto 40px;}
.menu-section-toggle{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--menu-toggle-bg);border:2px solid var(--gold-mid);color:var(--gold-mid);padding:24px 20px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.85rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;border-radius:3px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.menu-section-toggle::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:100%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(200,132,26,0.1),rgba(200,132,26,0.05));transition:left 0.4s ease;}
.menu-section-toggle:hover::before{left:0;}
.menu-section-toggle:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 8px 25px var(--shadow-color);border-color:var(--gold-dark);}
.menu-section-toggle.active{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08);color:white;border-color:var(--gold-dark);}
.menu-section-icon{font-size:2.5rem;display:block;filter:drop-shadow(2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2));}
.menu-section-toggle .toggle-arrow{font-size:0.9rem;transition:transform 0.4s ease;display:inline-block;margin-top:8px;}
.menu-section-toggle.active .toggle-arrow{transform:rotate(180deg);}
.menu-collapsible{max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1),opacity 0.4s ease;opacity:0;}
.menu-collapsible.open{max-height:9999px;opacity:1;}
.premium-menu-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:16px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto 40px;}
.premium-menu-item{background:var(--card-bg2);border:1px solid var(--border-color);padding:20px;position:relative;transition:all 0.3s ease;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:15px;}
.premium-menu-item::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8841a,transparent);opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s ease;}
.premium-menu-item:hover{border-color:rgba(200,148,26,0.5);transform:translateX(5px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px var(--shadow-color);}
.premium-menu-item:hover::before{opacity:1;}
.menu-item-left{flex:1;}
.premium-item-name{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--text-primary);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px;letter-spacing:0.05em;}
.premium-item-desc{font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.6;font-style:italic;opacity:0.8;margin-bottom:8px;}
.premium-item-tag{display:inline-block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.58rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;color:var(--gold-mid);border:1px solid rgba(200,148,26,0.3);padding:3px 10px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.menu-item-right{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0;}
.premium-item-price{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--gold-mid);font-weight:700;}
.add-to-cart-btn{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08);color:white;border:none;padding:9px 18px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.68rem;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;white-space:nowrap;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.add-to-cart-btn::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:100%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0c060,#c8841a);transition:left 0.3s ease;z-index:0;}
.add-to-cart-btn:hover::before{left:0;}
.add-to-cart-btn span{position:relative;z-index:1;}
.add-to-cart-btn:active{transform:scale(0.98);}
/* Cart added animation */
.add-to-cart-btn.added{animation:btnAdded 0.4s ease;}
@keyframes btnAdded{0%{transform:scale(1);}50%{transform:scale(1.15);}100%{transform:scale(1);}}
/* ===== FLOATING CART ===== */
.floating-cart{position:fixed;bottom:90px;right:28px;z-index:9998;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:12px;}
.cart-button{width:60px;height:60px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.6rem;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(200,132,26,0.4);transition:all 0.3s ease;position:relative;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);}
.cart-button:hover{transform:scale(1.1);box-shadow:0 6px 30px rgba(200,132,26,0.6);}
.cart-count{position:absolute;top:-5px;right:-5px;background:#ff4444;color:white;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;border:2px solid var(--bg-primary);animation:cartPulse 0.5s ease;}
@keyframes cartPulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);}50%{transform:scale(1.25);}}
.cart-panel{width:380px;max-height:70vh;background:var(--card-bg);border:2px solid var(--gold-mid);border-radius:4px;box-shadow:0 8px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);display:none;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
.cart-panel.open{display:flex;animation:slideInUp 0.3s ease;}
@keyframes slideInUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
.cart-header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08);color:white;padding:16px 20px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);}
.cart-header h3{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.95rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0;}
.close-cart{background:none;border:none;color:white;font-size:1.3rem;cursor:pointer;width:28px;height:28px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all 0.3s ease;border-radius:50%;}
.close-cart:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);transform:rotate(90deg);}
.cart-items{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px;}
.cart-item{background:var(--card-bg2);border:1px solid var(--border-color);padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;position:relative;}
.cart-item::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08);}
.cart-item-info{flex:1;}
.cart-item-name{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-primary);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px;}
.cart-item-category{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-secondary);opacity:0.7;font-style:italic;margin-bottom:6px;}
.cart-item-price{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--gold-mid);font-weight:700;}
.remove-item{background:none;border:1px solid rgba(255,68,68,0.3);color:#ff4444;padding:4px 10px;font-size:0.65rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;}
.remove-item:hover{background:#ff4444;color:white;border-color:#ff4444;}
.cart-empty{text-align:center;padding:40px 20px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;}
.cart-empty-icon{font-size:3rem;margin-bottom:12px;opacity:0.3;}
.cart-footer{border-top:1px solid rgba(200,148,26,0.3);padding:65px 50px 28px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0f0a03 0%,#000000 100%);position:relative;z-index:1;}
.cart-total{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px;padding-bottom:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);}
.cart-total-label{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.85rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-primary);}
.cart-total-price{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1.3rem;color:var(--gold-mid);font-weight:700;}
.checkout-btn{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#25d366,#128c7e);color:white;border:none;padding:14px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;}
.checkout-btn:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#128c7e,#25d366);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(37,211,102,0.4);}
/* ===== ORDER MODAL (Name/Phone/Table) ===== */
.order-modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--overlay-bg);z-index:99999;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;}
.order-modal-overlay.open{display:flex;}
.order-modal{background:var(--card-bg);border:2px solid var(--gold-mid);border-radius:4px;padding:40px 36px;max-width:420px;width:100%;position:relative;animation:slideInUp 0.3s ease;}
.order-modal::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:10%;right:10%;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8841a,transparent);}
.order-modal h3{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;color:var(--gold-mid);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;}
.order-modal p{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:24px;}
.form-group{margin-bottom:18px;}
.form-group label{display:block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;color:var(--gold-mid);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;}
.form-group input,.form-group select{width:100%;background:var(--card-bg2);border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-primary);padding:12px 14px;font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1rem;outline:none;transition:border-color 0.3s ease;}
.form-group input:focus,.form-group select:focus{border-color:var(--gold-mid);}
.modal-btns{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:24px;}
.modal-btns .btn-gold{flex:1;text-align:center;padding:14px;}
.modal-cancel{flex:1;background:transparent;border:1.5px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);padding:14px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;}
.modal-cancel:hover{border-color:var(--gold-mid);color:var(--gold-mid);}
.close-modal-x{position:absolute;top:12px;right:14px;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:1.3rem;cursor:pointer;transition:color 0.3s ease;}
.close-modal-x:hover{color:var(--gold-mid);}
/* ===== RESERVATION SECTION ===== */
.reservation-sec{background:var(--bg-primary);border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);}
.reservation-form-wrap{max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--card-bg);border:1px solid var(--border-color);padding:50px 48px;position:relative;}
.reservation-form-wrap::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:10%;right:10%;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8841a,transparent);}
.res-form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px;}
.res-form-group{margin-bottom:0;}
.res-form-group.full{grid-column:span 2;}
.res-form-group label{display:block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:var(--gold-mid);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;}
.res-form-group input,.res-form-group select,.res-form-group textarea{width:100%;background:var(--card-bg2);border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-primary);padding:13px 15px;font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1rem;outline:none;transition:border-color 0.3s ease;resize:none;}
.res-form-group input:focus,.res-form-group select:focus,.res-form-group textarea:focus{border-color:var(--gold-mid);}
.res-submit{width:100%;margin-top:24px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08);color:white;border:none;padding:16px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.res-submit::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:100%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0c060,#c8841a);transition:left 0.35s ease;z-index:0;}
.res-submit:hover::before{left:0;}
.res-submit:hover{color:var(--brown);}
.res-submit span{position:relative;z-index:1;}
/* ===== GALLERY ===== */
.gallery-sec{background:var(--bg-secondary);border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);}
.gallery-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:14px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.gal-item{position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:var(--card-bg2);border:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.4s ease;}
.gal-item:first-child{grid-column:span 2;height:310px;}
.gal-item:not(:first-child){height:220px;}
.gal-item img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform 0.5s ease;}
.gal-item:hover img{transform:scale(1.06);}
.gal-item:hover{border-color:rgba(200,148,26,0.4);}
.gal-inner{text-align:center;padding:20px;}
.gal-icon{font-size:2.8rem;display:block;margin-bottom:10px;}
.gal-label{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;color:rgba(200,148,26,0.6);text-transform:uppercase;}
.gal-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(200,132,26,0.07);opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s ease;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.gal-item:hover .gal-overlay{opacity:1;}
.gal-overlay-text{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.68rem;letter-spacing:0.25em;color:var(--gold-mid);text-transform:uppercase;border:1px solid rgba(200,132,26,0.38);padding:8px 20px;background:var(--map-badge-bg);}
/* ===== LIGHTBOX ===== */
.lightbox{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.94);z-index:100000;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;padding:20px;}
.lightbox.open{display:flex;animation:fadeIn 0.3s ease;}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;}to{opacity:1;}}
.lightbox-content{position:relative;max-width:800px;width:100%;text-align:center;}
.lightbox-display{width:100%;height:400px;background:var(--card-bg);border:1px solid var(--gold-mid);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.lightbox-display .lb-icon{font-size:6rem;}
.lightbox-display .lb-label{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:var(--gold-mid);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:16px;}
.lightbox-caption{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-style:italic;color:rgba(200,148,26,0.8);margin-top:18px;font-size:1rem;}
.lightbox-nav{display:flex;gap:20px;margin-top:20px;justify-content:center;}
.lb-btn{background:rgba(200,132,26,0.15);border:1px solid var(--gold-mid);color:var(--gold-mid);width:46px;height:46px;font-size:1.2rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.lb-btn:hover{background:rgba(200,132,26,0.3);}
.lb-close{position:absolute;top:20px;right:20px;background:none;border:1px solid rgba(200,148,26,0.3);color:var(--gold-mid);width:40px;height:40px;font-size:1.1rem;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all 0.3s ease;}
.lb-close:hover{background:rgba(200,132,26,0.2);}
.lb-dots{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin-top:14px;}
.lb-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(200,132,26,0.3);border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;}
.lb-dot.active{background:var(--gold-mid);transform:scale(1.2);}
/* ===== TESTIMONIALS ===== */
.testi-sec{background:var(--bg-primary);}
.testi-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.testi-card{padding:33px 26px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);background:var(--testi-card-bg);position:relative;transition:all 0.3s ease;}
.testi-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 12px 35px var(--shadow-color);border-color:rgba(200,148,26,0.3);}
.testi-card::before{content:'"';position:absolute;top:10px;left:20px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:4rem;color:rgba(200,148,26,0.16);line-height:1;}
.testi-text{font-size:0.98rem;color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.9;font-style:italic;margin-top:20px;margin-bottom:20px;}
.testi-author{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
.testi-avatar{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.95rem;color:white;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;}
.testi-name{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--gold-mid);}
.testi-role{font-size:0.76rem;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:2px;font-style:italic;opacity:0.7;}
.testi-stars{color:var(--gold-mid);font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;margin-top:3px;}
/* ===== LOCATION ===== */
.location-sec{background:var(--bg-secondary);border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);}
.location-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:65px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;align-items:start;}
.loc-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:28px;}
.loc-block{display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:flex-start;}
.loc-icon-box{width:46px;height:46px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.1rem;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--loc-icon-bg);}
.loc-info-text h4{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:var(--gold-mid);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:7px;}
.loc-info-text p{color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:0.98rem;line-height:1.75;font-style:italic;}
.loc-info-text a{color:var(--gold-mid);text-decoration:none;transition:color 0.3s;}
.loc-info-text a:hover{color:var(--gold-dark);}
.map-wrap{height:400px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);overflow:hidden;position:relative;}
.map-wrap iframe{width:100%;height:100%;border:none;filter:sepia(20%) saturate(80%);}
.map-badge{position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;background:var(--map-badge-bg);border:1px solid rgba(200,148,26,0.28);padding:7px 15px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.14em;color:var(--gold-mid);text-transform:uppercase;z-index:1;}
/* ===== CTA ===== */
.cta-sec{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0d0800 0%,#1a0f02 40%,#0f0a03 70%,#000000 100%);text-align:center;padding:115px 40px;border-top:1px solid rgba(200,148,26,0.3);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,148,26,0.3);position:relative;overflow:hidden;z-index:1;}
.cta-sec::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,rgba(200,140,20,0.12) 0%,rgba(140,90,8,0.05) 45%,transparent 70%);}
.cta-logo-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;margin-bottom:35px;position:relative;}
.cta-sec h2{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3.5vw,2.5rem);font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f5d080,#c8841a,#f5d080);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;margin-bottom:14px;position:relative;}
.cta-sec p{font-size:1.08rem;color:rgba(220,185,110,0.82);max-width:480px;margin:0 auto 38px;line-height:1.85;font-style:italic;position:relative;}
.cta-btns{display:flex;gap:18px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;position:relative;}
/* ===== FOOTER ===== */
footer{background:var(--footer-bg);border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);padding:65px 50px 28px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.footer-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:48px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto 48px;}
.footer-brand-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08,#c8841a);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;margin-bottom:2px;}
.footer-brand-sub{font-family:'Dancing Script',cursive;font-size:1rem;color:var(--gold-mid);display:block;margin-bottom:12px;}
.footer-brand p{color:var(--footer-text);font-size:0.92rem;line-height:1.85;font-style:italic;max-width:270px;margin-top:8px;}
.footer-social{display:flex;gap:9px;margin-top:20px;}
.soc-btn{width:37px;height:37px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.9rem;text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.3s ease;color:var(--gold-mid);background:var(--card-bg);}
.soc-btn:hover{border-color:var(--gold-dark);background:rgba(200,132,26,0.06);color:var(--gold-dark);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.footer-col h4{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:var(--gold-mid);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px;padding-bottom:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);}
.footer-col ul{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px;}
.footer-col ul a{color:var(--footer-text);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.9rem;font-style:italic;transition:color 0.3s ease;}
.footer-col ul a:hover{color:var(--gold-mid);}
.footer-bottom{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding-top:26px;border-top:1px solid rgba(200,148,26,0.1);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;}
.footer-bottom p{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--footer-bottom-text);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;}
.footer-bottom-right{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;color:rgba(200,148,26,0.42);text-transform:uppercase;}
/* ===== WHATSAPP FLOAT ===== */
.wa-float{position:fixed;bottom:28px;right:28px;width:54px;height:54px;background:#25d366;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.45rem;text-decoration:none;z-index:9999;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(37,211,102,0.38);transition:all 0.3s ease;animation:waPulse 2.5s ease infinite;}
.wa-float:hover{transform:scale(1.1);}
@keyframes waPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(37,211,102,0.38);}50%{box-shadow:0 4px 28px rgba(37,211,102,0.62);}}
/* ===== LOADER ===== */
#loader{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--loader-bg);z-index:99999;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;transition:opacity 0.6s ease;}
#loader.hide{opacity:0;pointer-events:none;}
.loader-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08,#c8841a);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;animation:loaderPulse 1.5s ease infinite;}
.loader-sub{font-family:'Dancing Script',cursive;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--gold-mid);}
.loader-bar{width:160px;height:1px;background:rgba(200,148,26,0.18);position:relative;overflow:hidden;margin-top:10px;}
.loader-fill{position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:100%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8841a,#f0c060,#c8841a,transparent);animation:loaderBar 1.4s ease infinite;}
@keyframes loaderBar{0%{left:-100%;}100%{left:100%;}}
@keyframes loaderPulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.55;}}
/* ===== TOAST NOTIFICATION ===== */
.toast{position:fixed;bottom:100px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(20px);background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08);color:white;padding:12px 28px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:0.12em;z-index:99998;opacity:0;transition:all 0.3s ease;pointer-events:none;border-radius:2px;}
.toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}
/* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
@media(max-width:1024px){
.exp-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
.footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:32px;}
}
@media(max-width:768px){
nav{padding:14px 18px;}
nav.scrolled{padding:10px 18px;}
.nav-links{display:none;}
.hamburger{display:flex;}
/* Theme toggle beside hamburger on mobile */
.nav-right-controls{gap:8px;}
.theme-toggle-nav{width:36px;height:36px;font-size:0.9rem;}
.section-pad{padding:65px 20px;}
.about-grid,.location-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:38px;}
.about-visual{height:auto;min-height:350px;padding:28px 20px;}
.exp-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
.gallery-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
.gal-item:first-child{grid-column:span 1;}
.gal-item,.gal-item:first-child{height:200px;}
.testi-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
.footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:28px;}
.footer-bottom{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;}
.hero-btns,.cta-btns{flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}
.menu-sections-wrapper{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:12px;}
.premium-menu-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
.cart-panel{width:calc(100vw - 40px);max-width:380px;}
.floating-cart{bottom:80px;right:16px;}
.cart-button{width:54px;height:54px;font-size:1.4rem;}
.res-form-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
.res-form-group.full{grid-column:span 1;}
.reservation-form-wrap{padding:32px 22px;}
.order-modal{padding:28px 22px;}
.lightbox-display{height:280px;}
.modal-btns{flex-direction:column;}
footer{padding:48px 22px 22px;}
}
/* ===== BRAND LOGO IMAGE ===== */
.brand-logo-img {
display: block;
max-width: 100%;
height: auto;
object-fit: contain;
border-radius: 16px;
}
.hero-brand-logo {
width: min(480px, 80vw);
margin: 0 auto 24px;
border-radius: 20px;
box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(200,148,26,0.2),
0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.55),
0 0 80px rgba(180,120,10,0.15);
animation: logoBreathe 4s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes logoBreathe {
0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(200,148,26,0.2), 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.55), 0 0 80px rgba(180,120,10,0.15); }
50%      { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(200,148,26,0.4), 0 12px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.65), 0 0 120px rgba(200,140,20,0.28); }
}
.cta-brand-logo {
width: min(340px, 68vw);
margin: 0 auto 36px;
border-radius: 18px;
box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(200,148,26,0.25),
0 6px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5),
0 0 60px rgba(180,120,10,0.12);
}
.footer-brand-logo {
width: 190px;
margin-bottom: 16px;
border-radius: 12px;
box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.45),
0 0 30px rgba(160,100,8,0.12);
}
.hero-brand-logo {
width: min(520px, 82vw);
margin: 0 auto 18px;
position: relative;
z-index: 1;
filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 24px rgba(180,120,10,0.18));
animation: logoBreathe 4s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes logoBreathe {
0%,100% { filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 24px rgba(180,120,10,0.18)); }
50%      { filter: drop-shadow(0 6px 36px rgba(200,140,20,0.32)); }
}
.cta-brand-logo {
width: min(380px, 70vw);
margin: 0 auto 32px;
position: relative;
z-index: 1;
filter: drop-shadow(0 3px 16px rgba(180,120,10,0.16));
}
.footer-brand-logo {
width: 200px;
margin-bottom: 14px;
filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(140,90,8,0.18));
}
.loader-brand-logo {
width: min(280px, 72vw);
margin-bottom: 12px;
filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 12px rgba(180,120,10,0.22));
animation: loaderPulse 1.5s ease infinite;
}
/* ===== VIP MODAL ===== */
.vip-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.92);z-index:999999;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;backdrop-filter:blur(6px);}
.vip-overlay.open{display:flex;animation:fadeIn 0.35s ease;}
.vip-modal{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0d0800 0%,#1a0f02 40%,#0f0a03 100%);border:1.5px solid #c8841a;border-radius:6px;padding:44px 38px 36px;max-width:460px;width:100%;position:relative;box-shadow:0 0 60px rgba(200,132,26,0.25),0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);animation:slideInUp 0.35s ease;}
.vip-modal::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:8%;right:8%;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#f0c060,#c8841a,#f0c060,transparent);}
.vip-modal::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:8%;right:8%;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(200,132,26,0.4),transparent);}
.vip-badge{display:inline-block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.58rem;letter-spacing:0.35em;color:#f0c060;border:1px solid rgba(240,192,96,0.35);padding:5px 16px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px;background:rgba(200,132,26,0.08);}
.vip-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(1.3rem,4vw,1.9rem);font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f5d080,#c8841a,#f5d080);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.2;}
.vip-sub{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:0.95rem;color:rgba(220,185,110,0.7);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:28px;line-height:1.6;}
.vip-field{margin-bottom:16px;}
.vip-field label{display:block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:#c8841a;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:7px;}
.vip-field input,.vip-field select{width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(200,148,26,0.35);color:#f0d090;padding:13px 15px;font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1rem;outline:none;transition:border-color 0.3s ease,box-shadow 0.3s ease;border-radius:3px;}
.vip-field input:focus,.vip-field select:focus{border-color:#c8841a;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(200,132,26,0.15);}
.vip-field input::placeholder{color:rgba(200,160,80,0.35);}
.vip-field select option{background:#0d0800;color:#f0d090;}
.vip-consent{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;margin-bottom:24px;}
.vip-consent input[type=checkbox]{width:16px;height:16px;margin-top:3px;accent-color:#c8841a;flex-shrink:0;cursor:pointer;}
.vip-consent label{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:0.88rem;color:rgba(200,160,80,0.65);font-style:italic;line-height:1.5;cursor:pointer;}
.vip-submit{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c8841a,#8b5a08);color:white;border:none;padding:15px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.35s ease;position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-radius:3px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.vip-submit::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:100%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0c060,#c8841a);transition:left 0.35s ease;z-index:0;}
.vip-submit:hover::before{left:0;}
.vip-submit:hover{color:#3a2a0a;}
.vip-submit span{position:relative;z-index:1;}
.vip-skip{width:100%;background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(200,148,26,0.2);color:rgba(200,160,80,0.4);padding:10px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s ease;border-radius:3px;}
.vip-skip:hover{border-color:rgba(200,148,26,0.4);color:rgba(200,160,80,0.6);}
.vip-success{text-align:center;}
.vip-success .success-icon{font-size:3.5rem;margin-bottom:16px;display:block;animation:successPop 0.5s ease;}
@keyframes successPop{0%{transform:scale(0);}70%{transform:scale(1.15);}100%{transform:scale(1);}}
.vip-success h3{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1.4rem;color:#f0c060;margin-bottom:10px;}
.vip-success p{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1rem;color:rgba(220,185,110,0.7);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:24px;}
.vip-wa-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#25d366,#128c7e);color:white;border:none;padding:14px 28px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;border-radius:3px;text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.3s ease;}
.vip-wa-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(37,211,102,0.4);}
.vip-loading{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.75rem;color:#c8841a;letter-spacing:0.15em;}
.vip-spinner{width:20px;height:20px;border:2px solid rgba(200,132,26,0.2);border-top-color:#c8841a;border-radius:50%;animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
@media(max-width:480px){.vip-modal{padding:32px 22px 28px;}}
.menu-category-header{grid-column:1/-1;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.68rem;letter-spacing:0.25em;color:var(--gold-mid);text-transform:uppercase;padding:14px 0 8px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,132,26,0.25);margin-top:6px;}
</style>
</head>
<body data-theme="light">
<canvas id="particleCanvas"></canvas>
<!-- VIP DATA COLLECTION MODAL -->
<div class="vip-overlay" id="vipOverlay">
<div class="vip-modal">
  <div id="vipFormState">
    <div class="vip-badge">✦ Exclusive VIP Access ✦</div>
    <div class="vip-title">Join The Royal Circle</div>
    <p class="vip-sub">Get exclusive hookah deals, VIP invites &amp; loyalty rewards delivered to your WhatsApp.</p>
    <div class="vip-field"><label>Full Name *</label><input type="text" id="vipName" placeholder="Your name" autocomplete="name"/></div>
    <div class="vip-field"><label>WhatsApp Number *</label><input type="tel" id="vipPhone" placeholder="10-digit mobile number" maxlength="10" inputmode="numeric"/></div>
    <div class="vip-field"><label>Date of Birth (Optional)</label><input type="date" id="vipDob"/></div>
    <div class="vip-field"><label>Favourite Flavor (Optional)</label><select id="vipFlavor"><option value="">Select your favourite</option><option>Double Apple</option><option>DBI Special</option><option>Blue Mist</option><option>Peach Bliss</option><option>Mango Tango</option><option>Pure Mint</option><option>Purple Reign</option><option>Strawberry Kiss</option><option>Watermelon Chill</option><option>Citrus Storm</option><option>Rose Garden</option><option>Pan Raas</option><option>Kiwi Blast</option><option>Cherry Bomb</option><option>Blueberry Ice</option><option>Other</option></select></div>
    <div class="vip-consent"><input type="checkbox" id="vipConsent" checked/><label for="vipConsent">I agree to receive exclusive offers, VIP updates &amp; loyalty rewards on WhatsApp from Signature Cafe.</label></div>
    <button class="vip-submit" onclick="submitVipForm()"><span>👑 Join the VIP Club</span></button>
    <button class="vip-skip" onclick="closeVipModal()">Maybe Later</button>
  </div>
  <div id="vipSuccessState" style="display:none;" class="vip-success">
    <span class="success-icon">🧡</span>
    <h3>Welcome to the Royal Circle!</h3>
    <p>You're now a VIP member. Exclusive deals &amp; hookah updates will arrive on your WhatsApp shortly.</p>
    <a href="https://wa.me/919700788178?text=Hi%20Signature%20Cafe!%20I%20just%20joined%20the%20VIP%20Club%20%F0%9F%91%91" target="_blank" class="vip-wa-btn">💬 Message Us on WhatsApp</a>
  </div>
  <div id="vipLoadingState" style="display:none;" class="vip-loading">
    <div class="vip-spinner"></div><span>Registering you...</span>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
<div id="loader">
<div class="loader-title">SIGNATURE CAFE</div>
<div class="loader-bar"><div class="loader-fill"></div></div>
</div>
<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>
<a href="https://wa.me/919700788178" target="_blank" class="wa-float" title="Chat on WhatsApp">💬</a>
<div class="order-modal-overlay" id="orderModalOverlay">
<div class="order-modal">
<button class="close-modal-x" onclick="closeOrderModal()">✕</button>
<h3>Complete Your Order</h3>
<p>Please share your details so we can process your order via WhatsApp.</p>
<div class="form-group">
<label>Your Name *</label>
<input type="text" id="orderName" placeholder="e.g. Arjun Reddy" />
</div>
<div class="form-group">
<label>Mobile Number *</label>
<input type="tel" id="orderPhone" placeholder="e.g. 9876543210" maxlength="10"/>
</div>
<div class="modal-btns">
<button class="btn-gold" onclick="confirmWhatsAppOrder()"><span>📱 Send Order</span></button>
<button class="modal-cancel" onclick="closeOrderModal()">Cancel</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox">
<button class="lb-close" onclick="closeLightbox()">✕</button>
<div class="lightbox-content">
<div class="lightbox-display" id="lbDisplay"></div>
<div class="lightbox-caption" id="lbCaption"></div>
<div class="lightbox-nav">
<button class="lb-btn" onclick="lbPrev()">&#8592;</button>
<button class="lb-btn" onclick="lbNext()">&#8594;</button>
</div>
<div class="lb-dots" id="lbDots"></div>
</div>
</div>
<nav id="navbar">
<a href="#home" class="nav-logo">
<span class="nav-logo-title">SIGNATURE CAFE</span>
</a>
<ul class="nav-links">
<li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
<li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
<li><a href="#menu">Menu</a></li>
<li><a href="#reservation">Reserve</a></li>
<li><a href="#location">Location</a></li>
<li><a href="tel:9700788178" class="nav-reserve">Call Now</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="nav-right-controls">
<button class="theme-toggle-nav" id="themeToggle" title="Toggle Theme">🌙</button>
<div class="hamburger" id="hamburger" onclick="toggleMobileMenu()">
<span></span><span></span><span></span>
</div>
</div>
</nav>
<div class="mobile-menu" id="mobileMenu">
<a href="#about" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">About</a>
<a href="#experience" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">Experience</a>
<a href="#menu" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">Menu</a>
<a href="#reservation" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">Reserve</a>
<a href="#location" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">Location</a>
<a href="tel:9700788178" style="color:var(--gold-mid);border:1px solid var(--gold-mid);padding:10px 24px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;">Call Now</a>
</div>
<section class="hero" id="home">
<div class="hero-logo" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
<img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Signature Cafe by HuQQa Cartel — An Experience" class="brand-logo-img hero-brand-logo" />
</div>
<div class="hero-btns">
<a href="#reservation" class="btn-gold"><span>Reserve Your Table</span></a>
<a href="#experience" class="btn-outline">Discover More</a>
</div>
<a href="#about" class="scroll-down">
<span>Scroll</span>
<div class="scroll-line"></div>
</a>
</section>
<section class="about section-pad" id="about">
<div class="about-grid">
<div class="about-content fade-up">
<h2>A Kingdom For<br>Hookah Royalty</h2>
<p>Nestled above SBI Bank at Piller No 1733, Madhapur — Signature Cafe is not just a destination. It is an experience crafted for those who appreciate the finest things in life.</p>
<p>Under the prestigious banner of HuQQa Cartel, we have redefined hookah culture in Hyderabad. Every visit is a ritual. Every moment becomes a memory that stays forever.</p>
<div class="about-stats">
<div class="stat-box"><span class="stat-num">50+</span><span class="stat-lbl">Flavors</span></div>
<div class="stat-box"><span class="stat-num">5★</span><span class="stat-lbl">Rated</span></div>
<div class="stat-box"><span class="stat-num">∞</span><span class="stat-lbl">Memories</span></div>
</div>
<a href="https://www.instagram.com/signature_hookah_lounge?igsh=OHR4bjJ2OTdnMjhp" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-top:18px;padding:11px 22px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#833ab4,#fd1d1d,#fcb045);color:#fff;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;transition:all 0.3s ease;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-2px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 6px 20px rgba(131,58,180,0.4)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow=''">📸 &nbsp;Follow on Instagram</a>
</div>
<div class="about-visual fade-up">
<div style="text-align:center;z-index:1;position:relative;padding:10px;">
<div class="sig-cafe-title" style="font-size:clamp(1.6rem,4vw,2.8rem);">Signature Cafe</div>
<div class="orn-divider" style="max-width:260px;">
<div class="orn-line-l"></div><div class="orn-dot"></div><div class="orn-diamond"></div><div class="orn-dot"></div><div class="orn-line-r"></div>
</div>
<div class="sig-tagline" style="font-size:0.55rem;margin-bottom:14px;margin-top:3px;">Where Moments Turn Into Memories...</div>
<div class="by-row" style="max-width:220px;margin:0 auto 12px;">
<div class="by-line-l"></div><div class="by-arr-l"></div>
<div class="by-badge" style="padding:4px 14px;"><span class="by-word" style="font-size:0.8rem;">by</span></div>
<div class="by-arr-r"></div><div class="by-line-r"></div>
</div>
<div class="huqqa-row" style="gap:1px;margin-bottom:3px;">
<span class="hqa-letter" style="font-size:clamp(1.8rem,5vw,3.5rem);">H</span>
<span class="hqa-letter" style="font-size:clamp(1.8rem,5vw,3.5rem);">u</span>
<div class="q-wrap" style="width:clamp(1.8rem,5vw,3.5rem);height:clamp(1.8rem,5vw,3.5rem);">
<span class="q-base" style="font-size:clamp(1.8rem,5vw,3.5rem);">Q</span>
<div class="q-ring" style="border-width:2px;"></div>
<div class="q-star" style="width:clamp(0.6rem,1.5vw,1.1rem);height:clamp(0.6rem,1.5vw,1.1rem);">
<svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" width="100%" height="100%"><circle cx="20" cy="20" r="5" fill="#c8841a"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="20" y2="3" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="20" y2="37" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="3" y2="20" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="37" y2="20" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="7.9" y2="7.9" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="32.1" y2="32.1" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="32.1" y2="7.9" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="7.9" y2="32.1" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="19" y1="23" x2="5" y2="37" stroke="#8b5a08" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="17" y1="22" x2="3" y2="36" stroke="#8b5a08" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
</div>
</div>
<div class="q-wrap" style="width:clamp(1.8rem,5vw,3.5rem);height:clamp(1.8rem,5vw,3.5rem);">
<span class="q-base" style="font-size:clamp(1.8rem,5vw,3.5rem);">Q</span>
<div class="q-ring" style="border-width:2px;"></div>
<div class="q-star" style="width:clamp(0.6rem,1.5vw,1.1rem);height:clamp(0.6rem,1.5vw,1.1rem);">
<svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" width="100%" height="100%"><circle cx="20" cy="20" r="5" fill="#c8841a"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="20" y2="3" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="20" y2="37" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="3" y2="20" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="37" y2="20" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="7.9" y2="7.9" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="32.1" y2="32.1" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="32.1" y2="7.9" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="7.9" y2="32.1" stroke="#c8841a" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="19" y1="23" x2="5" y2="37" stroke="#8b5a08" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="17" y1="22" x2="3" y2="36" stroke="#8b5a08" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
</div>
</div>
<span class="hqa-letter" style="font-size:clamp(1.8rem,5vw,3.5rem);">a</span>
</div>
<div class="cartel-text" style="font-size:clamp(1.1rem,3vw,2rem);">cartel</div>
<div class="bot-orn" style="max-width:180px;"><div class="bot-line-l"></div><div class="bot-center"><div class="bot-sm-dot"></div><div class="bot-dia"></div><div class="bot-sm-dot"></div></div><div class="bot-line-r"></div></div>
<div class="exp-text" style="font-size:0.8rem;">An Experience</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="experience section-pad" id="experience">
<div class="sec-header fade-up">
<span class="sec-label">What We Offer</span>
<h2 class="sec-title">The Signature Experience</h2>
<div class="divider-row"><div class="div-line"></div><div class="div-dia"></div><div class="div-line r"></div></div>
<p class="sec-sub">Every element crafted with precision. Every moment designed for perfection.</p>
</div>
<div class="exp-grid">
<div class="exp-card fade-up"><span class="card-icon">🪔</span><div class="card-title">Premium Hookah</div><p class="card-desc">Hand-crafted hookah sessions with the finest imported tobacco blends and premium coal management by our expert hookah masters.</p></div>
<div class="exp-card fade-up"><span class="card-icon">☕</span><div class="card-title">Signature Brews</div><p class="card-desc">From rich Arabic coffees to exotic specialty teas — our beverage menu is curated to complement your experience perfectly.</p></div>
<div class="exp-card fade-up"><span class="card-icon">🍽️</span><div class="card-title">Culinary Delights</div><p class="card-desc">A carefully crafted food menu featuring premium appetizers, sharing platters and signature dishes to elevate your evening.</p></div>
<div class="exp-card fade-up"><span class="card-icon">🎵</span><div class="card-title">Ambient Atmosphere</div><p class="card-desc">Curated music, warm golden lighting and an interior designed to make every moment feel exclusive, intimate and unforgettable.</p></div>
<div class="exp-card fade-up"><span class="card-icon">👥</span><div class="card-title">Private Seating</div><p class="card-desc">Exclusive private seating zones for groups, couples and corporate gatherings — your own kingdom within our kingdom.</p></div>
<div class="exp-card fade-up"><span class="card-icon">✨</span><div class="card-title">Royal Service</div><p class="card-desc">Our trained staff anticipates your every need — delivering five-star service with every visit, every single time.</p></div>
</div>
</section>

<div class="sec-header fade-up">
<span class="sec-label">Signature Cafe</span>
<h2 class="sec-title">Our Premium Menu</h2>

<p class="sec-sub">Select your favorites and add to cart. Order directly via WhatsApp.</p>
</div>

<div class="cart-panel" id="cartPanel">
<div class="cart-header">
<h3>🛒 Your Cart</h3>
<button class="close-cart" onclick="toggleCart()">×</button>
</div>
<div class="cart-items" id="cartItems">
<div class="cart-empty"><div class="cart-empty-icon">🛍️</div><p>Your cart is empty<br>Add some items to get started!</p></div>
</div>
<div class="cart-footer" id="cartFooter" style="display:none;">
<div class="cart-total">
<span class="cart-total-label">Total</span>
<span class="cart-total-price" id="cartTotal">₹0</span>
</div>
<button class="checkout-btn" onclick="openOrderModal()"><span>💬</span><span>Order via WhatsApp</span></button>
</div>
</div>
<div class="cart-button" onclick="toggleCart()">🛒<div class="cart-count" id="cartCount" style="display:none;">0</div></div>
</div>

<div class="gal-item fade-up" onclick="openLightbox(3)"><div class="gal-inner"><span class="gal-icon">✨</span><div class="gal-label">Premium Seating</div></div><div class="gal-overlay"><div class="gal-overlay-text">View</div></div></div>

</div></div>

<section class="testi-sec section-pad">
<div class="sec-header fade-up">
<span class="sec-label">What They Say</span>
<h2 class="sec-title">Royal Reviews</h2>
<div class="divider-row"><div class="div-line"></div><div class="div-dia"></div><div class="div-line r"></div></div>
</div>
<div class="testi-grid">
<div class="testi-card fade-up"><p class="testi-text">"The HuQQa Cartel experience at Signature Cafe is unlike anything in Hyderabad. The ambience, the hookah quality, the service — absolutely royal. We come here every weekend without fail."</p><div class="testi-author"><div class="testi-avatar">A</div><div><div class="testi-name">Arjun Reddy</div><div class="testi-role">Regular Guest</div><div class="testi-stars">★★★★★</div></div></div></div>
<div class="testi-card fade-up"><p class="testi-text">"Best hookah lounge in Madhapur hands down. The DBI Special and Kiwi Blast combo is out of this world. Staff is extremely professional. This place truly turns moments into memories."</p><div class="testi-author"><div class="testi-avatar">S</div><div><div class="testi-name">Sneha Sharma</div><div class="testi-role">Food Blogger</div><div class="testi-stars">★★★★★</div></div></div></div>
<div class="testi-card fade-up"><p class="testi-text">"Took my entire team here for a corporate outing and it was a massive hit. Private seating, great food, premium hookah — Signature Cafe delivered on every single promise. Will return soon!"</p><div class="testi-author"><div class="testi-avatar">R</div><div><div class="testi-name">Rahul Verma</div><div class="testi-role">Business Owner</div><div class="testi-stars">★★★★★</div></div></div></div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="reservation-sec section-pad" id="reservation">
<div class="sec-header fade-up">
<span class="sec-label">Book Your Spot</span>
<h2 class="sec-title">Reserve a Table</h2>
<div class="divider-row"><div class="div-line"></div><div class="div-dia"></div><div class="div-line r"></div></div>
<p class="sec-sub">Secure your royal experience. Fill out the form and we'll confirm via WhatsApp.</p>
</div>
<div class="reservation-form-wrap fade-up">
<div class="res-form-grid">
<div class="res-form-group">
<label>Your Name *</label>
<input type="text" id="resName" placeholder="e.g. Arjun Reddy" />
</div>
<div class="res-form-group">
<label>Mobile Number *</label>
<input type="tel" id="resPhone" placeholder="e.g. 9876543210" maxlength="10"/>
</div>
<div class="res-form-group">
<label>Date *</label>
<input type="date" id="resDate" />
</div>
<div class="res-form-group">
<label>Time *</label>
<input type="time" id="resTime" />
</div>
<div class="res-form-group">
<label>Number of Guests *</label>
<select id="resGuests">
<option value="">Select</option>
<option>1-2 Guests</option>
<option>3-4 Guests</option>
<option>5-6 Guests</option>
<option>7-10 Guests</option>
<option>10+ Guests (Corporate)</option>
</select>
</div>
<div class="res-form-group">
<label>Occasion (Optional)</label>
<select id="resOccasion">
<option value="">Select Occasion</option>
<option>Birthday Celebration</option>
<option>Anniversary</option>
<option>Corporate Outing</option>
<option>Friends Hangout</option>
<option>Date Night</option>
<option>Other</option>
</select>
</div>
<div class="res-form-group full">
<label>Special Requests (Optional)</label>
<textarea id="resNote" rows="3" placeholder="Any special arrangements, dietary needs, or requests..."></textarea>
</div>
</div>
<button class="res-submit" onclick="sendReservation()"><span>📱 Confirm via WhatsApp</span></button>
</div>
</section>

<div class="sec-header fade-up">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="footer-brand">

</div>

</div>
</footer>
<script>
// ===== LOADER =====
window.addEventListener('load',()=>setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('loader').classList.add('hide'),2000));
// ===== NAVBAR =====
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{
document.getElementById('navbar').classList.toggle('scrolled',window.scrollY>60);
});
// ===== MOBILE MENU =====
function toggleMobileMenu(){document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.toggle('open');}
function closeMobileMenu(){document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.remove('open');}
// ===== THEME TOGGLE =====
const themeToggle=document.getElementById('themeToggle');
let isDark=false;
const savedTheme=localStorage.getItem('theme');
if(savedTheme==='dark'){document.body.setAttribute('data-theme','dark');themeToggle.textContent='☀️';isDark=true;}
themeToggle.addEventListener('click',()=>{
isDark=!isDark;
document.body.setAttribute('data-theme',isDark?'dark':'light');
themeToggle.textContent=isDark?'☀️':'🌙';
localStorage.setItem('theme',isDark?'dark':'light');
});
// ===== SCROLL ANIMATIONS =====
const observer=new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting)setTimeout(()=>e.target.classList.add('show'),100);});
},{threshold:0.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-up').forEach(el=>observer.observe(el));
// ===== PARTICLES =====
(function(){
const canvas=document.getElementById('particleCanvas');
const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
let particles=[];
function resize(){canvas.width=window.innerWidth;canvas.height=window.innerHeight;}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize',resize);
const isDarkMode=()=>document.body.getAttribute('data-theme')==='dark';
function createParticle(){
return{
x:Math.random()*canvas.width,
y:Math.random()*canvas.height,
size:Math.random()*2+0.5,
speedX:(Math.random()-0.5)*0.3,
speedY:(Math.random()-0.5)*0.3,
opacity:Math.random()*0.5+0.1
};
}
for(let i=0;i<60;i++)particles.push(createParticle());
function animate(){
ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
const color=isDarkMode()?'200,148,26':'139,90,8';
particles.forEach(p=>{
p.x+=p.speedX;p.y+=p.speedY;
if(p.x<0||p.x>canvas.width)p.speedX*=-1;
if(p.y<0||p.y>canvas.height)p.speedY*=-1;
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.size,0,Math.PI*2);
ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(${color},${p.opacity})`;
ctx.fill();
});
requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}
animate();
})();
// ===== TOAST =====
function showToast(msg){
const t=document.getElementById('toast');
t.textContent=msg;t.classList.add('show');
setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),2200);
}
// ===== CART =====
let cart=[];
let activeMenuSection=null;
function toggleMenuSection(section){
const sections=['food','flavors'];
const collapsibles={food:document.getElementById('foodMenuCollapsible'),flavors:document.getElementById('flavorsMenuCollapsible')};
const buttons={food:document.getElementById('foodMenuBtn'),flavors:document.getElementById('flavorsMenuBtn')};
sections.forEach(sec=>{
if(sec===section){
if(activeMenuSection===section){collapsibles[sec].classList.remove('open');buttons[sec].classList.remove('active');activeMenuSection=null;}
else{collapsibles[sec].classList.add('open');buttons[sec].classList.add('active');activeMenuSection=section;}
}else{collapsibles[sec].classList.remove('open');buttons[sec].classList.remove('active');}
});
}
function addToCart(name,price,category,btn){
const existing=cart.find(i=>i.name===name);
if(existing)existing.quantity++;
else cart.push({name,price,category,quantity:1});
updateCart();
// Button animation
if(btn){btn.classList.add('added');setTimeout(()=>btn.classList.remove('added'),400);}
showToast('✓ Added to cart');
// Pulse cart button
const cb=document.querySelector('.cart-button');
cb.style.animation='none';
setTimeout(()=>cb.style.animation='cartPulse 0.5s ease',10);
}
function removeFromCart(index){cart.splice(index,1);updateCart();}
function updateCart(){
const cartItemsEl=document.getElementById('cartItems');
const cartCountEl=document.getElementById('cartCount');
const cartTotalEl=document.getElementById('cartTotal');
const cartFooterEl=document.getElementById('cartFooter');
const totalItems=cart.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.quantity,0);
if(totalItems>0){cartCountEl.style.display='flex';cartCountEl.textContent=totalItems;cartFooterEl.style.display='block';}
else{cartCountEl.style.display='none';cartFooterEl.style.display='none';}
if(cart.length===0){
cartItemsEl.innerHTML='<div class="cart-empty"><div class="cart-empty-icon">🛍️</div><p>Your cart is empty<br>Add some items to get started!</p></div>';
}else{
cartItemsEl.innerHTML=cart.map((item,i)=>`
<div class="cart-item">
<div class="cart-item-info">
<div class="cart-item-name">${item.name}${item.quantity>1?' (x'+item.quantity+')':''}</div>
<div class="cart-item-category">${item.category}</div>
<div class="cart-item-price">₹${item.price*item.quantity}</div>
</div>
<button class="remove-item" onclick="removeFromCart(${i})">Remove</button>
</div>`).join('');
}
const total=cart.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.price*i.quantity),0);
cartTotalEl.textContent='₹'+total;
}
function toggleCart(){document.getElementById('cartPanel').classList.toggle('open');}
// ===== ORDER MODAL =====
function openOrderModal(){
if(cart.length===0){showToast('Your cart is empty!');return;}
document.getElementById('orderModalOverlay').classList.add('open');
document.getElementById('cartPanel').classList.remove('open');
}
function closeOrderModal(){document.getElementById('orderModalOverlay').classList.remove('open');}
function confirmWhatsAppOrder(){
const name=document.getElementById('orderName').value.trim();
const phone=document.getElementById('orderPhone').value.trim();
if(!name){showToast('Please enter your name');return;}
if(!phone||phone.length<10){showToast('Please enter a valid mobile number');return;}
let msg='🎯 *NEW ORDER — SIGNATURE CAFE*\n\n';
msg+='━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n';
msg+='👤 *Customer:* '+name+'\n';
msg+='📞 *Mobile:* +91 '+phone+'\n';
msg+='━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n';
['Food','Flavor','Hookah Pot'].forEach(cat=>{
const items=cart.filter(i=>i.category===cat);
if(items.length){
msg+='*'+cat.toUpperCase()+':*\n';
items.forEach(i=>{msg+='• '+i.name+(i.quantity>1?' (x'+i.quantity+')':'')+' — ₹'+(i.price*i.quantity)+'\n';});
msg+='\n';
}
});
const total=cart.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.price*i.quantity),0);
msg+='━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n';
msg+='💰 *TOTAL: ₹'+total+'*\n\n';
msg+='📍 Signature Cafe, Madhapur, Hyderabad';
window.open('https://wa.me/919700788178?text='+encodeURIComponent(msg),'_blank');
closeOrderModal();
cart=[];updateCart();
showToast('Order sent! We will confirm shortly.');
}
// ===== RESERVATION =====
function sendReservation(){
const name=document.getElementById('resName').value.trim();
const phone=document.getElementById('resPhone').value.trim();
const date=document.getElementById('resDate').value;
const time=document.getElementById('resTime').value;
const guests=document.getElementById('resGuests').value;
const occasion=document.getElementById('resOccasion').value;
const note=document.getElementById('resNote').value.trim();
if(!name||!phone||!date||!time||!guests){showToast('Please fill all required fields');return;}
if(phone.length<10){showToast('Please enter a valid mobile number');return;}
let msg='🪔 *TABLE RESERVATION — SIGNATURE CAFE*\n\n';
msg+='━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n';
msg+='👤 *Name:* '+name+'\n';
msg+='📞 *Mobile:* +91 '+phone+'\n';
msg+='📅 *Date:* '+date+'\n';
msg+='🕐 *Time:* '+time+'\n';
msg+='👥 *Guests:* '+guests+'\n';
if(occasion)msg+='🎉 *Occasion:* '+occasion+'\n';
if(note)msg+='📝 *Notes:* '+note+'\n';
msg+='━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n';
msg+='📍 Signature Cafe, Piller 1733, Madhapur, Hyderabad';
window.open('https://wa.me/919700788178?text='+encodeURIComponent(msg),'_blank');
showToast('Reservation sent! We will confirm shortly.');
}
// ===== LIGHTBOX =====
const galleryData=[
{icon:'🌙',label:'Hookah Experience',caption:'Premium hookah sessions with our signature setups'},
{icon:'🌙',label:'Night Ambience',caption:'Golden lighting, curated music — an unforgettable night'},
{icon:'☕',label:'Signature Beverages',caption:'Crafted drinks to complement your experience'},
{icon:'✨',label:'Premium Seating',caption:'Exclusive seating zones designed for royalty'},
{icon:'🎵',label:'Live Atmosphere',caption:'The vibe, the energy, the culture — only at Signature Cafe'}
];
let currentLb=0;
function openLightbox(index){
currentLb=index;
renderLightbox();
document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');
document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
}
function closeLightbox(){document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow='';}
function lbPrev(){currentLb=(currentLb-1+galleryData.length)%galleryData.length;renderLightbox();}
function lbNext(){currentLb=(currentLb+1)%galleryData.length;renderLightbox();}
function renderLightbox(){
const d=galleryData[currentLb];
document.getElementById('lbDisplay').innerHTML=`<div style="text-align:center;"><div class="lb-icon">${d.icon}</div><div class="lb-label">${d.label}</div></div>`;
document.getElementById('lbCaption').textContent=d.caption;
const dots=document.getElementById('lbDots');
dots.innerHTML=galleryData.map((_,i)=>`<button class="lb-dot${i===currentLb?' active':''}" onclick="currentLb=${i};renderLightbox()"></button>`).join('');
}
document.getElementById('lightbox').addEventListener('click',function(e){if(e.target===this)closeLightbox();});
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(!document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.contains('open'))return;if(e.key==='ArrowLeft')lbPrev();else if(e.key==='ArrowRight')lbNext();else if(e.key==='Escape')closeLightbox();});
// ===== INIT =====
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{
  updateCart();
  // Show VIP modal after 3 seconds on every visit
  setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('vipOverlay').classList.add('open'),3000);
});
// ===== VIP MODAL =====
const VIP_SHEET_URL='https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbz349J_PvWnmuBV7-inq3M_WtiacgiPgPB_mCkxo3K8ZQeXul2IKKYJOk5sO1c7aaPFLQ/exec';
function closeVipModal(){
  document.getElementById('vipOverlay').classList.remove('open');
  localStorage.setItem('vipDismissed','1');
}
function submitVipForm(){
  const name=document.getElementById('vipName').value.trim();
  const phone=document.getElementById('vipPhone').value.trim();
  const dob=document.getElementById('vipDob').value;
  const flavor=document.getElementById('vipFlavor').value;
  const consent=document.getElementById('vipConsent').checked;
  if(!name){showToast('Please enter your name');return;}
  if(!phone||phone.length<10||!/^[6-9]\d{9}$/.test(phone)){showToast('Please enter a valid 10-digit WhatsApp number');return;}
  if(!consent){showToast('Please accept WhatsApp consent to continue');return;}
  document.getElementById('vipFormState').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('vipLoadingState').style.display='flex';
  const payload={name,phone,dob,flavor,consent,timestamp:new Date().toLocaleString('en-IN',{timeZone:'Asia/Kolkata'})};
  if(VIP_SHEET_URL&&VIP_SHEET_URL!=='1J69GrDL5NV8gfMgqjbelMTmeRbtQZ7LeD9U4Bu1r120'){
    fetch(VIP_SHEET_URL,{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(payload)})
      .then(()=>showVipSuccess()).catch(()=>showVipSuccess());
  } else {
    setTimeout(()=>showVipSuccess(),1200);
  }
  localStorage.setItem('vipDismissed','1');
}
function showVipSuccess(){
  document.getElementById('vipLoadingState').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('vipSuccessState').style.display='block';
}
document.getElementById('vipOverlay').addEventListener('click',function(e){if(e.target===this)closeVipModal();});
function cartAdd(btn){var r=btn.closest(".premium-menu-item");var n=r.querySelector(".premium-item-name").textContent;var p=parseInt(r.querySelector(".premium-item-price").textContent.replace(/[^0-9]/g,""));addToCart(n,p,"Food",btn);}
</script>
</body>
</html>
